zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Peter Veel於1264年出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾托特沃斯時，他的父親Robert Veel29歲，母親Hawise Gore25歲。他於1287年之前與Hawise Kingston結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1343年在亞特 澤亞恩格列斯 昌爾享年79歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Peter Veel于1264年出生在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾托特沃斯时，他的父亲Robert Veel29岁，母亲Hawise Gore25岁。他于1287年之前与Hawise Kingston结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于1343年在亞特 澤亞恩格列斯 昌爾享年79岁。

nameMeanings.name: Veel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Veal
meanings: nickname from Anglo-Norman French viel, Old French vieil ‘old’ (i.e. ‘the elder’). Without the article, this name is indistinguishable from the relationship name Vial , and there has also been some confusion with Vail and Vale .
nickname for a docile, calf-like person, from Middle English vel(e), veille, fel(e) ‘calf; veal’, Old French veel ‘calf’.

nameMeanings.name: Peter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Peter Veel was born in 1264, in Tortworth, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert Veel, was 29 and his mother, Hawise Gore, was 25. He married Hawise Kingston before 1287. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died in 1343, in English Channel, At Sea, at the age of 79.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Peter Veel est né en 1264, à Tortworth, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Veel, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Hawise Gore, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Hawise Kingston avant 1287. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé en 1343, à English Channel, En mer, à l’âge de 79 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Peter Veel 1264 in Tortworth, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Veel 29 und seine Mutter Hawise Gore 25. Er hat vor 1287 Hawise Kingston geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb 1343 im Alter von 79 Jahren in English Channel, Auf dem Meer.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Peter Veel è nato il nel 1264 nel Tortworth, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Robert Veel, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Hawise Gore, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Hawise Kingston prima del 1287. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì nel 1343, nel English Channel, At Sea, all'età di 79 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Peter Veelが1264年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアトルトウオルスで生まれた時，父Robert Veelは29歳，母Hawise Goreは25歳であった。1287年以前にHawise Kingstonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1343年にアト セアエングリッシュ チャネルで79歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Peter Veel(이)가 1264년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 토르트워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Veel(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Hawise Gore(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1287년 이전 Hawise Kingston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1343년 앳 시 잉글리시 챈에서 79세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Peter Veel nasceu em 1264, em Tortworth, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert Veel, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Hawise Gore, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Hawise Kingston antes 1287. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1343, em English Channel, Em alto mar, com 79 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Peter Veel родился в 1264 г. в местности тортворт, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert Veel было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Hawise Gore, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Hawise Kingston перед 1287 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер в 1343 г. в местности энглиш чаннель, ат сеа в возрасте 79 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Peter Veel nació en 1264, en Tortworth, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert Veel, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Hawise Gore, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Hawise Kingston antes de 1287. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió en 1343, en English Channel, En el mar, a la edad de 79 años.
